name: writing-style-catalog
description: Composable writing instructions on four orthogonal axes (Voice, Tone, Style, Format): pick one entry per axis and the builder assembles a ready-to-paste prompt prefix that steers any LLM toward a precise register, reasoning pattern, and layout. Ships 60 curated entries, 205 worked examples, 66 diff-pairs, and 10 recipes, plus a style-profile skill that captures your personal default style. Use when you need a precise, composable writing instruction for an LLM.
